description: Authored skill guides available in the Muibook knowledge bundle.

skills.title: Create Web Components
skills.useWhen: Building or reviewing native Web Components with explicit APIs, shadow DOM, slots, tokens, part maps, runtime attrs, wrappers, and knowledge exports.

skills.title: Compose Web Components
skills.useWhen: Composing Web Components into complete interfaces with declarative HTML, layout primitives, slots, and parent-child context.

skills.title: Style Web Components
skills.useWhen: Applying themes, token layers, surface decisions, CSS variables, parts, and targeted override patterns.

skills.title: Create UX Guidelines
skills.useWhen: Writing or reviewing component UX guidelines, anatomy, accessibility, variants, behavior, composition examples, and asset publishing guidance.
